title: Romeo and Juliet
author: William Shakespeare
description: The Greatest love tragedy among classics of English.Story of Romeo-Juliet by the greatest writer to have ever inked the paper.In William Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet, a long feud between the Montague and Capulet families disrupts the city of Verona and causes tragic results for Romeo and Juliet. Revenge, love, and a secret marriage force the young star-crossed lovers to grow up quickly -- and fate causes them to commit suicide in despair.This is the first love of the lovers of English literatu...
